description: Player chooses the ascension branch (write-once gene lock).
Player chooses the creation branch (write-once gene lock).
An artifact becomes visible to the traveler for the first time.
Traveler enters a spatial node. Duplicate entries are idempotent.
A node's completion condition is satisfied (no-op in state reducer).
A portal becomes traversable (no-op in state reducer).
A lore entry is revealed to the traveler. Duplicate entries are idempotent.
